ddls:
CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the contact */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the contact */,
  "middle_name" TEXT /* Middle name of the contact */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the company the contact is associated with */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role the contact holds */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the contact */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title or position of the contact */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the contact belongs to within their company */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the contact */,
  "preferred_communication" TEXT /* Preferred method of communication */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contacts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the company */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the company */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the company */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the company (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "year_founded" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the company */,
  "employee_count" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the company was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department associated with the role */,
  "reports_to" TEXT /* Role that this role reports to */,
  "level" TEXT /* Level of the role (e.g., entry-level, mid-level, senior) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "parent_department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent department (for hierarchical department structures) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department manager */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated to the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the department was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_parent_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_departments_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contact_department" (
  "contact_department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact-department relationship */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department */,
  "primary_contact" INTEGER /* Indicates if the contact is the primary contact for the department */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact started in the department */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the contact left the department (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_department_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contact_department_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "communication_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each communication log */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the communication */,
  "communication_type" TEXT /* Type of communication (e.g., email, phone call) */,
  "communication_date" TEXT /* Date of the communication */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the communication */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the communication */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the communication (e.g., 30 minutes) */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date for follow-up communication */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_communication_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, manager, user) */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role assigned to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user-role relationship (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role this permission is assigned to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource or module the permission applies to */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action the permission allows (e.g., create, read, update, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_name FOREIGN KEY ("role_name") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)
